mapper.sql: COALESCE( ( SELECT CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(ii.cached_url), '') IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) LIKE '%/terrapedia-images/%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%(demo)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%28demo%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])demo([._?&#/-]|$)' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%(placed)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%28placed%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])placed([._?&#/-]|$)' THEN TRIM(ii.cached_url) END FROM item_images ii WHERE ii.item_id = i.id AND ii.deleted = 0 AND ii.status = 1 AND NULLIF(TRIM(ii.cached_url), '') IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) LIKE '%/terrapedia-images/%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%(demo)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%28demo%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])demo([._?&#/-]|$)' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%(placed)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%28placed%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])placed([._?&#/-]|$)' ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOCATE('/terrapedia-images/', ii.cached_url) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN ii.is_primary = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ii.sort_order ASC, ii.id ASC LIMIT 1 ), CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(i.image), '') IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) LIKE '%/terrapedia-images/%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT LIKE '%(demo)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT LIKE '%28demo%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])demo([._?&#/-]|$)' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT LIKE '%(placed)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT LIKE '%28placed%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])placed([._?&#/-]|$)' THEN TRIM(i.image) END )

CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(i.image), '') IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) LIKE '%/terrapedia-images/%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT LIKE '%(demo)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT LIKE '%28demo%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])demo([._?&#/-]|$)' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT LIKE '%(placed)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT LIKE '%28placed%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(i.image)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])placed([._?&#/-]|$)' THEN TRIM(i.image) END
mapper.select:
SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh AS nameZh, i.internal_name AS internalName, ii_primary.cached_url AS image, i.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, i.damage, i.defense, i.rarity_id AS rarityId, COALESCE(ir.display_name_zh, ir.display_name_en) AS rarity, i.game_period_id AS gamePeriodId, COALESCE(gp.display_name_zh, gp.display_name_en) AS gamePeriod, i.game_model_id AS gameModelId, i.is_stackable AS isStackable, i.stack_size AS stackSize, i.status, i.created_at AS createdAt, i.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM ( SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh, i.internal_name, i.image, i.category_id, i.damage, i.defense, i.rarity_id, i.game_period_id, i.game_model_id, i.is_stackable, i.stack_size, i.status, i.created_at, i.updated_at FROM items i FORCE INDEX (idx_items_deleted)
i.deleted = 0
AND ( i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR i.name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR i.internal_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') )
AND ( i.category_id IN
#{categoryIdItem}
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM item_category_rel icr_filter WHERE icr_filter.item_id = i.id AND icr_filter.deleted = 0 AND icr_filter.status = 1 AND icr_filter.category_id IN
#{categoryIdItem}
) )
AND ( i.category_id = #{categoryId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM item_category_rel icr_filter WHERE icr_filter.item_id = i.id AND icr_filter.deleted = 0 AND icr_filter.status = 1 AND icr_filter.category_id = #{categoryId} ) )
AND i.rarity_id = #{rarityId}
AND i.game_period_id = #{gamePeriodId}
ORDER BY i.name ASC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.name DESC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.rarity_id ASC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.rarity_id DESC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.id ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) i LEFT JOIN item_images ii_primary ON ii_primary.id = ( SELECT ii.id FROM item_images ii WHERE ii.item_id = i.id AND ii.deleted = 0 AND ii.status = 1 AND NULLIF(TRIM(ii.cached_url), '') IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) LIKE '%/terrapedia-images/%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%(demo)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%28demo%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])demo([._?&#/-]|$)' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%(placed)%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT LIKE '%28placed%29%' AND LOWER(TRIM(ii.cached_url)) NOT REGEXP '(^|[/_[:space:]-])placed([._?&#/-]|$)' ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOCATE('/terrapedia-images/', ii.cached_url) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN ii.is_primary = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ii.sort_order ASC, ii.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = i.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN item_rarity ir ON ir.id = i.rarity_id AND ir.deleted = 0 AND ir.status = 1 LEFT JOIN game_period gp ON gp.id = i.game_period_id AND gp.deleted = 0 AND gp.status = 1
ORDER BY i.name ASC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.name DESC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.rarity_id ASC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.rarity_id DESC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.id ASC

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh AS nameZh, i.internal_name AS internalName, AS image, i.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, i.rarity_id AS rarityId, COALESCE(ir.display_name_zh, ir.display_name_en) AS rarity, i.game_period_id AS gamePeriodId, COALESCE(gp.display_name_zh, gp.display_name_en) AS gamePeriod, i.is_stackable AS isStackable, i.stack_size AS stackSize FROM ( SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh, i.internal_name, i.image, i.category_id, i.rarity_id, i.game_period_id, i.is_stackable, i.stack_size FROM items i FORCE INDEX (idx_items_deleted)
i.deleted = 0
AND ( i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR i.name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR i.internal_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') )
AND ( i.category_id IN
#{categoryIdItem}
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM item_category_rel icr_filter WHERE icr_filter.item_id = i.id AND icr_filter.deleted = 0 AND icr_filter.status = 1 AND icr_filter.category_id IN
#{categoryIdItem}
) )
AND ( i.category_id = #{categoryId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM item_category_rel icr_filter WHERE icr_filter.item_id = i.id AND icr_filter.deleted = 0 AND icr_filter.status = 1 AND icr_filter.category_id = #{categoryId} ) )
AND i.rarity_id = #{rarityId}
AND i.game_period_id = #{gamePeriodId}
ORDER BY i.name ASC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.name DESC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.rarity_id ASC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.rarity_id DESC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.id ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) i LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = i.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN item_rarity ir ON ir.id = i.rarity_id AND ir.deleted = 0 AND ir.status = 1 LEFT JOIN game_period gp ON gp.id = i.game_period_id AND gp.deleted = 0 AND gp.status = 1
ORDER BY i.name ASC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.name DESC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.rarity_id ASC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.rarity_id DESC, i.id ASC
ORDER BY i.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh AS nameZh, i.internal_name AS internalName, AS image, i.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT icr.category_id ORDER BY icr.is_primary DESC, icr.sort_order ASC, icr.category_id ASC SEPARATOR ',') FROM item_category_rel icr WHERE icr.item_id = i.id AND icr.deleted = 0 AND icr.status = 1 ) AS relatedCategoryIdsRaw, i.description, i.description_zh AS descriptionZh, i.damage, i.defense, i.knockback AS knockback, i.use_time AS useTime, i.width AS width, i.height AS height, i.buy AS buy, i.sell AS sell, i.tooltip AS tooltip, i.tooltip_zh AS tooltipZh, i.rarity_id AS rarityId, COALESCE(ir.display_name_zh, ir.display_name_en) AS rarity, i.game_period_id AS gamePeriodId, COALESCE(gp.display_name_zh, gp.display_name_en) AS gamePeriod, i.game_model_id AS gameModelId, i.is_stackable AS isStackable, i.stack_size AS stackSize, i.source_npcs_json AS sourceNpcsJson, i.status, i.created_at AS createdAt, i.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM items i LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = i.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN item_rarity ir ON ir.id = i.rarity_id AND ir.deleted = 0 AND ir.status = 1 LEFT JOIN game_period gp ON gp.id = i.game_period_id AND gp.deleted = 0 AND gp.status = 1 WHERE i.id = #{id} AND i.deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh AS nameZh, i.internal_name AS internalName, AS image, i.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, i.description, i.description_zh AS descriptionZh, i.damage, i.defense, i.knockback AS knockback, i.use_time AS useTime, i.width AS width, i.height AS height, i.buy, i.sell, i.tooltip, i.tooltip_zh AS tooltipZh, i.rarity_id AS rarityId, COALESCE(ir.display_name_zh, ir.display_name_en) AS rarity, i.game_period_id AS gamePeriodId, COALESCE(gp.display_name_zh, gp.display_name_en) AS gamePeriod, i.game_model_id AS gameModelId, i.is_stackable AS isStackable, i.stack_size AS stackSize FROM items i LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = i.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN item_rarity ir ON ir.id = i.rarity_id AND ir.deleted = 0 AND ir.status = 1 LEFT JOIN game_period gp ON gp.id = i.game_period_id AND gp.deleted = 0 AND gp.status = 1 WHERE i.id = #{id} AND i.deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh AS nameZh, i.internal_name AS internalName, AS image, i.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, i.rarity_id AS rarityId, COALESCE(ir.display_name_zh, ir.display_name_en) AS rarity FROM items i LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = i.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN item_rarity ir ON ir.id = i.rarity_id AND ir.deleted = 0 AND ir.status = 1 WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND ( i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', ''), '%') OR i.internal_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.name_zh = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN i.name = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN i.internal_name = #{keyword} THEN 1 WHEN REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') = REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', '') THEN 1 WHEN i.name_zh LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 WHEN REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', ''), '%') THEN 3 WHEN i.name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 4 WHEN i.internal_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 5 ELSE 6 END ASC, CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(i.name_zh, i.name)) ASC, i.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh AS nameZh, i.internal_name AS internalName, AS image, i.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, i.rarity_id AS rarityId, COALESCE(ir.display_name_zh, ir.display_name_en) AS rarity FROM items i LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = i.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN item_rarity ir ON ir.id = i.rarity_id AND ir.deleted = 0 AND ir.status = 1 WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND ( i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', ''), '%') OR i.internal_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.name_zh = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN i.name = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN i.internal_name = #{keyword} THEN 1 WHEN REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') = REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', '') THEN 1 WHEN i.name_zh LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 WHEN REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', ''), '%') THEN 3 WHEN i.name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 4 WHEN i.internal_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 5 ELSE 6 END ASC, CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(i.name_zh, i.name)) ASC, i.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
